notes.body: Training Files link sent — Orientation, Scheduling/Teamworx job aids, Train the Trainer, Food Safety & Sanitation criticals, Mission/Values, Misc job aids (crew huddle + deployment). Use on shift to assign training and back up huddle topics.
Halo Effect & Suggestive Sales Policy — ALL employees sign by FRIDAY 5/8/26 5:00 PM. Email signed forms to Crystal. FGU Overdue Rate: get Dixie to 0% overdue by 5/15 (4 days left — sitting at 13%).
Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I. — print 2065 Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I.docx, post on comm board, be ready to discuss in-store this week.

Prep Area sensor offline — temp monitoring on prep is DARK. Confirm gateway is plugged in (power + internet) at open. If still offline after 10 min, open a CM support ticket: support@compliancemate.com or 877-425-7800.
Drain clogged — Zendesk ticket [0ZYJW2-NKVM1] opened. Confirm drain status at open. If still clogged at 6 AM, pull a snake; escalate to Estep Maintenance if not cleared by 8 AM.

Post Period Labor Not Posted (5/10) — BLOCKS period close. Inv-Final for Post (5/10). L-Rev overdue: 5/7, 5/8, 5/9, 5/10 (4 days). VO-Rec-BOSS: Alpha-Ohio Valley 5/8 & 5/9. VO-Inv-Performance Fdsvce (5/11).
